title: Bridge Essay: The neural mechanisms of mindfulness-based pain relief: a functional magnetic resonance imaging-based review and primer.
concept: Self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual.

**The neural mechanisms of mindfulness-based pain relief: a functional magnetic resonance imaging-based review and primer.** — Pain Rep (2019). DOI: 10.1097/PR9.0000000000000759. PMID: 31579851. The advent of neuroimaging methodologies, such as functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), has significantly advanced our understanding of the neurophysiological processes supporting a wide spectrum of mind-body approaches to treat pain. A promising self-regulatory practice, mindfulness meditation, reliably alleviates experimentally induced and clinical pain. Yet, the neural mechanisms supporting mindfulness-based pain relief remain poorly characterized. The present review delineates eviden
